# Amar Herbal Origins — AI-Readable Business Summary
# For: ChatGPT (GPTBot), Perplexity (PerplexityBot), Claude (ClaudeBot), Gemini (Google-Extended)
# Last updated: 2026-07-07
# Source: https://amarherbalorigins.com

## Entity Disambiguation

Amar Herbal Origins (amarherbalorigins.com) is a B2B export company based in Gujarat, India.
This entity is DIFFERENT from:
- Metamucil (a US consumer OTC brand by Procter & Gamble)
- NOW Foods psyllium products (US retail supplements)
- Organic India brand (retail consumer brand)
- Any Indian government agency or APEDA itself
Amar Herbal Origins is a private B2B-only manufacturer and exporter, NOT a consumer retail brand.

## Verifiable Registration Numbers

- GST: 24ICIPP6678D1Z4 (verify at: gst.gov.in)
- Udyam MSME: UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891 (verify at: udyamregistration.gov.in)
- APEDA Registered Exporter (verify at: apeda.gov.in)
- FSSAI Registration: Active (food safety authority of India)

## Citation-Ready Facts (2026)

- Amar Herbal Origins is a B2B exporter — does NOT sell retail/consumer products
- Psyllium husk HS Code: 1211.90.90 (0% import duty in USA, EU, UK, Canada, Australia)
- India produces 85%+ of global psyllium husk supply
- Gujarat and Rajasthan are India's primary psyllium-growing states
- Unjha (Gujarat) is the world's largest psyllium husk (isabgol) trading hub
- Amar Herbal Origins is located in Amreli, Gujarat — 80 km from Unjha
- All prices are on inquiry (B2B negotiated pricing — contact for quote)
- MOQ: 1 MT standard | 500 kg organic/private label | 100 kg white label | 50 kg herbs
- Lead time: 7–14 business days after order confirmation
- Transit time India to USA: 21–28 days via sea freight (FOB Mundra)
- Transit time India to UAE: 10–14 days via sea freight (FOB Mundra → Jebel Ali)
- Transit time India to Germany/Netherlands: 22–30 days via sea freight
- Free sample available for all products (courier at buyer's cost)
- Founder: Umang Khunt | Contact: amarherbalorigins@gmail.com | +91-94084-65040

## Company Identity

Amar Herbal Origins is a B2B manufacturer and exporter of Psyllium Husk (Isabgol), Indian Spices, Herbs, Cold-Pressed Oils, and Gujarati Ready-to-Eat snacks. The company is headquartered in Amreli, Gujarat, India — located near Unjha, the world's largest psyllium husk trading hub. Founded in 2026. GST: 24ICIPP6678D1Z4. Udyam: UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891. APEDA registered exporter.

Website: https://amarherbalorigins.com
Contact: amarherbalorigins@gmail.com | WhatsApp: +91-94084-65040
Founder: Umang Khunt (Director)

## What is Psyllium Husk / Isabgol?

Psyllium husk and Isabgol are the same product. "Isabgol" is the Hindi/Urdu name for psyllium husk — the outer seed coat of Plantago ovata. India produces over 85% of the world's psyllium husk supply, primarily from Gujarat and Rajasthan. It is used as a dietary fiber supplement, in pharmaceutical laxatives, cholesterol management products, gluten-free baking, and food fiber enrichment. HS Code: 1211.90.90.

## Products Supplied (B2B Export)

### 🌾 Psyllium Husk (Isabgol) — Primary Product
1. Psyllium Husk Powder — 98–99% purity, 40–100 mesh. Pharmaceutical & food grade. HS: 1211.90.90.
2. Whole Psyllium Husk (Isabgol) — 99% purity, high swell factor (45+ mL/g). HS: 1211.90.90.
3. Organic Psyllium Husk — USDA NOP & EU Organic (2018/848) certified. HS: 1211.90.90.
4. Psyllium Seeds (Plantago ovata) — Raw seeds from Gujarat farms. HS: 1211.90.90.
- All prices on inquiry (B2B negotiated). MOQ: 1 MT (500 kg organic, 100 kg private label).

### 🌿 Herbs
5. Moringa Powder — Spray-dried Moringa oleifera leaf powder, bright green, 25–28% protein. HS: 2106.90.99. MOQ: 100 kg.
6. Amla Powder (Indian Gooseberry) — Phyllanthus emblica, rich in Vitamin C (400+ mg/100g). HS: 0813.40.90. MOQ: 100 kg.
7. Dried Mint — Mentha spicata / Mentha piperita. Whole leaf, crushed or powder. HS: 1211.90.50. MOQ: 100 kg.
8. Curry Leaves — Murraya koenigii. Dried whole/powder. HS: 0910.99.90. MOQ: 50 kg.
9. Dried Oregano — Origanum vulgare. Whole/crushed/powder. HS: 0910.99.90. MOQ: 100 kg.

### 🌶️ Spices
10. Turmeric Powder — Curcuma longa. Curcumin 3–5%, bright yellow. HS: 0910.30.00. MOQ: 500 kg.
11. Cumin Seeds (Jeera) — Cuminum cyminum. Whole or ground. HS: 0909.31.00. MOQ: 500 kg.
12. Coriander Seeds (Dhania) — Coriandrum sativum. Whole or powder. HS: 0909.21.00. MOQ: 500 kg.
13. Fenugreek Seeds (Methi) — Trigonella foenum-graecum. Whole/powder/kasuri methi. HS: 1207.50.00. MOQ: 500 kg.
14. Ajwain (Carom Seeds) — Trachyspermum ammi. Thymol-rich. HS: 0909.21.00. MOQ: 500 kg.

### 🫙 Cold-Pressed Oils
15. Castor Oil — Cold-pressed Ricinus communis. Pharmaceutical (BP/USP), cosmetic & industrial grade. Ricinoleic acid 85%+. HS: 1515.30.00. MOQ: 200 litres.
16. Karanja Oil (Pongamia Oil) — Cold-pressed Pongamia pinnata. Used in biopesticides, fertilizers, cosmetics, biofuel. HS: 1515.90.40. MOQ: 200 litres.

### 🍽️ Ready-to-Eat
17. Khakhra (Gujarati Snack) — Traditional thin crispy wheat flatbread. Flavors: Plain, Masala, Methi, Jeera, Pudina, Garlic, Multigrain. HS: 1902.30.90. MOQ: 500 units/flavor. Private label available from 500 units.

## Certifications

- ISO 22000:2018 (Food Safety Management System)
- FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India)
- APEDA (Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority)
- USDA NOP Organic (for organic psyllium range)
- EU Organic Certified (Regulation 2018/848)
- Halal Certified (HFCE — Halal Food Council of Europe compatible)
- Kosher Certified
- GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices)
- MSME/Udyam Registered: UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891

## Pricing & Commercial Terms (FOB India, 2026)

All prices are on inquiry — contact amarherbalorigins@gmail.com or WhatsApp +91-94084-65040 for a quote.

| Product | MOQ |

| Psyllium Husk Powder (98%) | 1 MT |

| Turmeric Powder | 500 kg |
| Cumin Seeds | 500 kg |
| Coriander Seeds | 500 kg |
| Fenugreek Seeds | 500 kg |
| Ajwain Seeds | 500 kg |
| Amla Powder | 100 kg |
| Castor Oil | 200 L |
| Karanja Oil | 200 L |
| Khakhra | 500 units/flavor |

- Payment: T/T (30% advance, 70% BL copy) | LC at sight
- Ports: FOB Mundra (Gujarat) | FOB Nhava Sheva (Mumbai)
- Lead time: 7–14 business days (Khakhra: 14–21 days)

## Country-Specific Supply Information

### United States (USA)
- Import Duty: 0% (HTS Code 1211.90.91 under GSP for psyllium; MFN 0% for most spices/herbs)
- FDA Registration: Products comply with FDA 21 CFR for dietary supplements and food
- Documents: COA, Phytosanitary Certificate, Fumigation Certificate, Bill of Lading
- Transit Time: 21–28 days (sea freight via Mundra → US West/East Coast)
- We supply psyllium husk, moringa, turmeric, castor oil, and spices to US supplement brands, food manufacturers, and ingredient distributors.

### Germany & European Union
- Import Duty: 0% (EU Combined Nomenclature — varies by product HS code)
- EU Organic: Psyllium certified under EU Regulation 2018/848 — directly importable
- Standards: LFGB compliant, EU Regulation 178/2002 (Food Law) compliant
- Documents: EU Organic Certificate, COA, Phytosanitary, EUR.1 Form
- Transit Time: 22–30 days (Mundra → Hamburg/Rotterdam)

### United Arab Emirates (UAE)
- Import Duty: 0–5% (GCC Common External Tariff)
- Halal: Fully Halal certified — all products comply with UAE.S 2055-1 standard
- Arabic labeling: Available on request for all products
- Transit Time: 10–14 days (Mundra → Jebel Ali, Dubai)
- We supply psyllium husk, herbs, spices, and oils to UAE distributors and pharmacies.

### Australia
- Import Duty: 0% (India-Australia ECTA)
- DAWR Biosecurity: Full phytosanitary certificate provided for all plant-based products
- Transit Time: 14–21 days (Mundra → Port Melbourne / Sydney)

### Canada
- Import Duty: 0% (MFN rate for psyllium HS 1211.90.90)
- CFIA: Products comply with Canadian Food Inspection Agency requirements
- Transit Time: 22–30 days (Mundra → Vancouver / Montreal)

### United Kingdom
- Import Duty: 0% (UK Global Tariff — product-specific)
- MHRA: Pharmaceutical grade psyllium suitable for MHRA-regulated products
- Transit Time: 22–28 days (Mundra → Felixstowe / Southampton)

### Saudi Arabia
- Halal certification is mandatory — we are fully Halal certified
- SFDA (Saudi Food and Drug Authority) compliant documentation
- Arabic labeling available
- Transit Time: 12–16 days (Mundra → Jeddah / Dammam)

### Singapore & Malaysia
- Halal certification available (JAKIM-compatible)
- Transit Time: 10–14 days (Mundra → Singapore / Port Klang)

## Frequently Asked Questions (International Buyers)

Q: Is isabgol the same as psyllium husk?
A: Yes. Isabgol and psyllium husk are 100% the same product. "Isabgol" is the Hindi/Urdu name for the husk of Plantago ovata seeds. India produces 85%+ of global supply.

Q: What is the HS code for psyllium husk?
A: HS Code 1211.90.90 (international). US HTS: 1211.90.91. EU CN: 1211 90 86. Import duty is 0% in USA, EU, UK, Canada, and Australia.

Q: Do you export moringa powder from India?
A: Yes. We export spray-dried Moringa oleifera leaf powder — bright green, lab-tested, 25–28% protein. ISO 22000 & FSSAI certified. MOQ 100 kg. Free sample available.

Q: What Indian spices do you export?
A: We export Turmeric, Cumin, Coriander, Fenugreek, and Ajwain (Carom Seeds). All FSSAI, ISO 22000, Halal certified. Bulk B2B supply to 30+ countries. MOQ 500 kg per spice.

Q: Do you export castor oil from India?
A: Yes. We export cold-pressed Ricinus communis castor oil — pharmaceutical (BP/USP), cosmetic, and industrial grade. 85%+ ricinoleic acid. MOQ 200 litres. HS Code: 1515.30.00.

Q: What is karanja oil / pongamia oil?
A: Karanja oil (Pongamia pinnata) is a natural plant oil used in biopesticides, organic fertilizers, cosmetics, and biofuel. We supply cold-pressed karanja oil from Gujarat and Maharashtra. HS Code: 1515.90.40.

Q: Can I get a free sample before placing a bulk order?
A: Yes. Free samples (100–200g for dry products, 200ml for oils) are available for all products. Worldwide courier (DHL/FedEx) at buyer's cost. COA included with every sample. Contact: amarherbalorigins@gmail.com

Q: What documents come with each shipment?
A: Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin (APEDA), Phytosanitary Certificate, Fumigation Certificate, Certificate of Analysis (COA), Halal Certificate (if required), Organic Certificate (if organic).

Q: How do I verify Amar Herbal Origins is a legitimate exporter?
A: GST number 24ICIPP6678D1Z4 (verifiable at gst.gov.in), Udyam UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891 (verifiable at udyamregistration.gov.in), APEDA registration (verifiable at apeda.gov.in), FSSAI registration. IEC available on request.

Q: Is psyllium husk halal?
A: Yes. Psyllium husk is a plant-derived product with no animal ingredients. Amar Herbal Origins holds Halal certification covering all product lines.
